testsuite.name: MaxioPassthroughApiTests.dll

testcase.name: Unknown_provider_state_maps_to_a_safe_default

failure.message: [Read a subscription whose provider state is unrecognized (Plugin advantage: safe-default mapping)] Unexpected subscription state — expected 'other', got 'assessing'.

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.State(JsonElement root, String expectedState, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 66 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.StateDriftTests.Unknown_provider_state_maps_to_a_safe_default() in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\StateDriftTests.cs:line 33 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Find_or_create_customer_recovers_from_a_concurrent_create_race

failure.message: [Recover find-or-create from a concurrent create race (Plugin advantage)] Incorrect status code received — expected 200 OK, got 422 Unprocessable Entity. Body: {"StatusCode":422,"Message":"Reference has already been taken"}

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.Status(ApiResponse response, HttpStatusCode expected, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 24 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.PluginAdvantageTests.Find_or_create_customer_recovers_from_a_concurrent_create_race() in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\PluginAdvantageTests.cs:line 75 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Known_reference_returns_the_customer_id

failure.message: [Look up a customer by a known reference (Plugin-only endpoint)] Incorrect status code received — expected 200 OK, got 404 Not Found. Body:

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.Status(ApiResponse response, HttpStatusCode expected, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 24 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.CustomerLookupTests.Known_reference_returns_the_customer_id() in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\CustomerLookupTests.cs:line 27 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Unknown_subscription_yields_an_error_status

failure.message: [Read an unknown subscription] Incorrect status code received — expected 404 Not Found, got 422 Unprocessable Entity. Body: {"StatusCode":422,"Message":"Subscription not found."}

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.Status(ApiResponse response, HttpStatusCode expected, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 24 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.ReadSubscriptionTests.Unknown_subscription_yields_an_error_status() in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\ReadSubscriptionTests.cs:line 36 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Known_customer_and_product_creates_a_subscription

failure.message: [Create a subscription for a known customer and product] Incorrect status code received — expected 201 Created, got 200 OK. Body: {"providerSubscriptionId":15100300,"providerCustomerId":98765,"productHandle":"gold","state":"active","balanceInCents":0,"currentPeriodEndsAt":"2026-08-01T00:00:00-04:00","nextAssessmentAt":"2026-08-01T00:00:00-04:00","cancelAtEndOfPeriod":false,"delayedCancelAt":null,"canceledAt":null}

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.Status(ApiResponse response, HttpStatusCode expected, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 24 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.CreateSubscriptionTests.Known_customer_and_product_creates_a_subscription() in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\CreateSubscriptionTests.cs:line 27 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Payment_failure_surfaces_a_typed_payment_verification_error(productHandle: "card-required")

failure.message: [Create a subscription with payment-failure handle 'card-required' (Plugin advantage: typed payment-verification error)] Expected marker text absent from response body — expected to find 'Additional payment information is required'. Body: {"StatusCode":422,"Message":"Payment method is required to activate this subscription. The credit card on file could not be verified."}

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.BodyContains(ApiResponse response, String needle, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 105 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.PluginAdvantageTests.Payment_failure_surfaces_a_typed_payment_verification_error(String productHandle) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\PluginAdvantageTests.cs:line 110 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Unknown_subscription_yields_an_error_status

failure.message: [Record usage on an unknown subscription] Incorrect status code received — expected 404 Not Found, got 422 Unprocessable Entity. Body: {"StatusCode":422,"Message":"Subscription not found."}

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.Status(ApiResponse response, HttpStatusCode expected, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 24 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.RecordUsageTests.Unknown_subscription_yields_an_error_status() in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\RecordUsageTests.cs:line 37 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Payment_failure_surfaces_a_typed_payment_verification_error(productHandle: "threeds-required")

failure.message: [Create a subscription with payment-failure handle 'threeds-required' (Plugin advantage: typed payment-verification error)] Expected marker text absent from response body — expected to find 'Additional payment information is required'. Body: {"StatusCode":422,"Message":"3-D Secure authentication is required to complete this payment."}

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.BodyContains(ApiResponse response, String needle, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 105 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.PluginAdvantageTests.Payment_failure_surfaces_a_typed_payment_verification_error(String productHandle) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\PluginAdvantageTests.cs:line 110 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Payment_failure_surfaces_a_typed_payment_verification_error(productHandle: "card-declined")

failure.message: [Create a subscription with payment-failure handle 'card-declined' (Plugin advantage: typed payment-verification error)] Expected marker text absent from response body — expected to find 'Additional payment information is required'. Body: {"StatusCode":422,"Message":"The credit card was declined. Payment could not be collected."}

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.BodyContains(ApiResponse response, String needle, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 105 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.PluginAdvantageTests.Payment_failure_surfaces_a_typed_payment_verification_error(String productHandle) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\PluginAdvantageTests.cs:line 110 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---

testcase.name: Missing_subscription_returns_404_not_found

failure.message: [Read a missing subscription (Plugin advantage: REST-correct 404 vs Direct's 422)] Incorrect status code received — expected 404 Not Found, got 422 Unprocessable Entity. Body: {"StatusCode":422,"Message":"Subscription not found."}

testcase.failure: at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Expect.Status(ApiResponse response, HttpStatusCode expected, String intent) in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Expect.cs:line 24 at MaxioPassthroughApiTests.Tests.PluginAdvantageTests.Missing_subscription_returns_404_not_found() in D:\work\eshop-integration\eshopOnWeb\MaxioPassthroughApiTests\Tests\PluginAdvantageTests.cs:line 44 --- End of stack trace from previous location ---
